div.p: State transitions must be atomic relative to the CollectionRegistry HashMap in M6. The ACTIVE state transition initiates asynchronous index warming in M4.

ul.li: M6 (Registry): ID reserved in global ApiState map.
Locks: Exclusive WriteLock held on record segment.
Access: Full CRUD + SEARCH operations permitted.
M1 (Storage): munmap call pending or in-progress.
Locks: Permanent WriteLock blocking new callers.
M4: Index structure corruption or OOM.
System: Automated telemetry triggered via M7.

div.p: Trigger: External RPC Call Action: Registry.reserve(id)
Guard: dim > 0 && align % 32 == 0 Action: M1::new(), M4::init_index()
Trigger: Out of Memory (OOM) Action: Rollback registry reservation
Triggers: INSERT, SEARCH, COMPACT Modules: M1 (Store), M2 (Distance), M4 (HNSW)
Trigger: External RPC Call Action: Registry.remove(id)
Action: M1::Drop, M4::Drop Result: All virtual address space released
Constraint: Must re-create collection from persistent journal (M1)
